title: stage_07_execute
content:
我已修复样式，现在按钮会正确显示并可以点击，请复制以下完整代码保存为 `index.html`，双击运行。
`html
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="zh-CN">
<head>
<meta charset="UTF-8">
<meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
<title>奇幻选择之旅</title>
</head>
<body style="margin:0;background:#0a0718;min-height:100vh;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-family:'Segoe UI','PingFang SC',sans-serif;padding:20px;">
<div style="width:800px;max-width:100%;background:rgba(20,14,48,0.9);border:1px solid rgba(120,9
